message:
The other day, I was trying to whip up dinner while keeping an eye on my toddler, who thought the kitchen floor was a dance floor. Amidst the chaos, I suddenly remembered our smoke alarm hadn't been tested in ages. I haphazardly grabbed a step stool, only to realize it was wedged under a pile of toys! Talk about a comedy of errors! 

After a few giggles and a mini rescue mission involving my little one and a few strategically placed snacks, we finally got the alarm checked. It reminded me that being prepared can sometimes feel like juggling while riding a unicycle! 

If you haven't checked your smoke alarms or thought about an escape plan recently, maybe this little refresher will help. Have you had any funny moments while getting your home ready for anything? Share below!
